name: bookkeepers managing 10-20 supplier invoices/month tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 10-20 supplier invoices/month, manual processing causes delays in bookkeeping accuracy. We automate invoice extraction and categorization instead of manual data entry into accounting software.
problem_solved: manual processing of invoices is time-consuming and error-prone
